task_completion.description: Navigate to the Queries section in the TailwindTraders project
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Azure DevOps web interface is visible, showing the 'TailwindTraders' project, and the 'Boards' -> 'Queries' page is open.

task_completion.description: Configure the top-level query to filter for User Stories
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the query editor, the top-level clause has 'Work Item Type' set to '=' and 'User Story'.

task_completion.description: Set the query type to 'Work items and direct links' with a 'does not contain' filter
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Type of query' is set to 'Work items and direct links'. The filter option radio button is set to 'Only return items that do not have matching links' (or equivalent 'Does not contain' logic).

task_completion.description: Configure the linked work items filter to target Tasks
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Linked work items' section of the query editor, there is a clause where 'Work Item Type' is set to '=' and 'Task'.

task_completion.description: Save the query with the correct name in the Shared Queries folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save query' dialog or the query header shows the name 'Stories without Tasks' and the folder path indicates it is saved under 'Shared Queries'.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to create the query
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Azure DevOps web interface in a browser, rather than using a terminal, script, or API tool.

integrity.description: No terminal commands were used to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no open terminal windows or command prompts executing Azure DevOps CLI (az boards) or PowerShell scripts to create the query.

integrity.description: The query was built using the actual query editor dropdowns
integrity.visual_evidence: The query editor fields (Field, Operator, Value) and radio buttons are visibly manipulated in the screenshots, rather than just typing a text summary.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project Name: TailwindTraders. Query Name: 'Stories without Tasks'. Query Folder: 'Shared Queries'. To successfully list User Stories without child Tasks, the query must be a 'Work items and direct links' (OneHop) query. The top level must filter for 'User Story', the link filter must be set to 'Only return items that do not have matching links' (Does not contain), and the linked work items must filter for 'Task'.
